title: subscription — subprocessors
description: The subscription module engages payment processors as subprocessors of personal data (name, email, billing address, IP, browser fingerprint, tax ID) and cardholder data (which we never see — provider-side).

subprocessors.name: Stripe
subprocessors.purpose: Payment method capture, recurring charges, invoice generation, tax calculation (Stripe Tax), customer portal.
data_processed: cardholder data (PAN / CVV / expiry) direct to Stripe via Elements
subprocessors.location: US (with EU processing for EU customers via Stripe EU entity)
subprocessors.cardholder_data_exposure: none — tokenised at capture; we only see tokens

subprocessors.name: Paddle
subprocessors.purpose: Same as Stripe. Paddle acts as Merchant of Record — they handle VAT / sales tax as the merchant.
data_processed: cardholder data direct to Paddle Checkout
